mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that reduces discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in periods of FEDFUNDS decline are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in unemployment rate below 4.0% signals strong labor market dynamics that boost corporate earnings visibility, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in triggered instances fall below 0.5% or fail to outperform baseline by 1.5% (t-test p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in housing starts above 1.2 million units signals robust demand for residential construction, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in triggered periods are negative or fail to exceed 1.0% (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in CPI inflation and declines in the federal funds rate signal accommodative policy amid rising price pressures, creating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in triggered instances are positive or Rank IC < 0.02 over 2-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month decline in industrial production below 100 signals weakening manufacturing activity, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in triggered periods exceed 0.5% or fail to underperform baseline by 1.5% (t-test p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: A 6-month decline in GDP growth below 2.0% signals weakening aggregate demand, creating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns in triggered periods are positive or Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month increase in payroll employment above 150k signals strong labor market performance, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns in triggered instances fall below 0.2% or fail to outperform baseline by 0.5% (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in residential sales and declines in unemployment rate signal strong consumer demand, creating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in triggered instances are negative or Rank IC < 0.02 over 2-year rolling windows.
